TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_nipaluma-bukacaw,_bokacaw, title = nipaluma-bukacaw,_bokacaw, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/nipaluma-bukacaw,_bokacaw} }

S.FORM: == bukacaw, bokacaw == ÁéâÂ±±‰ΩõÁî≤Ëçâ u siwkay nu nipaluma u sanek nu nipaluma malaheci tu imelang pasubana i cacudadan a lacul u zuma a cidekay a kamu, saungay misapayu' a cidekay u sulit nu zuma a kamu-Hulam atu Amilika
S.PHON: == buka ¶aw, boka ¶aw == ***** u siwkaj nu nipar~…æuma u san…ôk nu nipar~…æuma mar~…æaƒß…ô ¶i tu im…ôr~…æa≈ã pasubana i ¶a ¶udadan a r~…æa ¶ur~…æ u zuma a ¶id…ôkaj a kamu, sau≈ãaj misapaju î~ ° a ¶id…ôkaj u sur~…æit nu zuma a kamu-ƒßur~…æam atu amir~…æika
S.FORM: == bukacaw, bokacaw == ÁéâÂ±±‰ΩõÁî≤Ëçâ u siwkay nu nipaluma u sanek nu nipaluma malaheci tu imelang pasubana i cacudadan a lacul u zuma a cidekay a kamu, saungay misapayu' a cidekay u sulit nu zuma a kamu-Hulam atu Amilika
